documentation.description:
=== Template Plugins ===
The `Wiki.Plugins.Templates` package defines an abstract template plugin.
To use the template plugin, the `Get_Template` procedure must be implemented.
It is responsible for getting the template content according to the plugin parameters.

tagged_types.name: File_Template_Plugin
tagged_types.code: type File_Template_Plugin is new Wiki_Plugin and Plugin_Factory with private;

tagged_types.name: Template_Plugin
tagged_types.code: type Template_Plugin is abstract new Wiki_Plugin with null record;

subprograms.name: Expand
Expand
Find
subprograms.code:
function Find (Factory : in File_Template_Plugin;
               Name    : in String) return Wiki_Plugin_Access

subprograms.name: Get_Template
Set_Template_Path
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Template_Path (Plugin : in out File_Template_Plugin;
                             Path   : in String)
